Original summary lacks specificity about what parameters control password generation. Description is completely empty, providing no guidance on inputs, outputs, or behavior. AI agents need to understand what parameters are available and what the operation returns to use it effectively.

data.summary_suggestion: Generate random password with specified criteria
data.description_suggestion: Generates a random password based on specified parameters. Accepts parameters to control password length, character types (uppercase, lowercase, digits, special characters), and exclusion rules. Returns a randomly generated password string meeting the specified criteria.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks specificity about what parameters control password generation. Description is completely empty, providing no guidance on inputs, outputs, or behavior. message: Operation 'post_/api/Text/Humanize' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, unclear_purpose, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary is vague about what 'humanize' means in this context. Description is empty, leaving AI agents uncertain about the operation's purpose and effects. Added clarification about input format (TextDto), output format, and use case to improve interpretability.

data.summary_suggestion: Convert text to more human-readable format
data.description_suggestion: Transforms input text into a more natural, human-readable format. Accepts a TextDto object containing the text to be humanized.
